source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Account Executive

San Francisco



About Coframe

"You guys are insane." — The OpenAI Eng Team

At Coframe, we are building the world's first AI Growth Engineer. We envision a future where user interfaces aren't static code, but living organisms that adapt, evolve, and personalize themselves in real time.



Why Coframe:

 - OpenAI: We're the only marketing technology company officially partnered with OpenAI. Our engineers and researchers work directly with their team to co-train a model specifically for our use case, which is a differentiator, and a testament to the technical caliber of our team.

 - Inbound Leads: We're currently growing at 190% QoQ with a consistent flood of high-intent inbound demand. We're looking for the right saleshumans to capture this demand and market opportunity.

 - Top VCs: We're backed by tier-1 investors including Khosla Ventures, Nat Friedman (former GitHub CEO), and Rich Miner (Android co-founder). Joining now means getting a seat on the rocket ship before our Series A: a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to join in the early innings.

 - Badass Team: Our founder is a serial entrepreneur who previously co-founded a unicorn with Tom Brady and guest lectures AI at Stanford. Our team includes researchers from top institutions who created some of the world's most popular open-source code generation projects.

 - Already Crushing It: For our first product, we built proprietary generative AI technology that enables our AI Agents to autonomously design, code, debug, and deploy A/B tests and personalization campaigns. We effectively 10x testing velocity, replacing agencies, legacy tools, and the need to pull in-house designers and engineers for testing and personalization. In the last 6 months, we have already driven $112.4M in incremental revenue for our customers.

What You'll Do:

 - Own the Full Cycle: Manage the end-to-end sales process from initial prospect interest and discovery to negotiation and closing.

 - Drive Deals: This includes running discovery, value presentations and demos, POCs, navigating legal, and proving ROI to multi-stakeholders (CPOs, VPs of Growth, and CMOs).

 - Methodology: Work with leadership to continuously refine the sales methodology by codifying learnings into playbooks, templates, and best practices as we scale.

 - Partner with Engineering: Collaborate cross-functionally with our Research and Product teams to feed market intelligence and customer feedback directly into the roadmap.

You May Be A Fit If:

 - 4+ years of Account Executive experience in B2B tech sales (AI or MarTech bonus) with a history of exceeding quotas.

 - Value-Based Seller: You can sell value, not just features and benefits. You know how to map technical capabilities to real-world business outcomes.

 - Master of Discovery: You are an expert at uncovering business goals, translating those to technical needs, and articulating how AI technology can drive revenue.

 - The "Builder" Mentality: You aren't just looking for a "plug-and-play" role. You are excited to create systems from the ground up and help codify best practices in an evolving market.

 - Multi-Stakeholder Expert: You know how to sell differently to end-users and managers VS executives and decision-makers.

Bonus Points:

 - Deep Curiosity: You have a passion for artificial intelligence and are excited to educate customers on how AI agents will redefine their growth strategies.

 - High Agency Saleshuman: You are entrepreneurial and have built a project or worked on a startup in the past.

 - 

Compensation

 - $240,000 - $400,000 (OTE)

 - Equity: Meaningful early-stage equity.

 - OTE: Competitive commission structure with uncapped upside.

Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors, including but not limited to experience and expertise in the requirements listed above.

Benefits:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Life Insurance and Disability Bene

source_jobs.title: Growth Strategist
source_jobs.description:
About Coframe

"You guys are insane." — The OpenAI Eng Team

At Coframe, we are building the world's first AI Growth Engineer. We envision a future where user interfaces aren't static code, but living organisms that adapt, evolve, and personalize themselves in real time.



Why Coframe:

 - Elite Team: Our founder is a serial entrepreneur who previously co-founded a unicorn with Tom Brady and guest lectures AI at Stanford. Our team includes researchers from top institutions who created some of the world's most popular open-source code generation projects.

 - Already Crushing It: We're currently growing at 120% QoQ. For our first product, we built proprietary generative AI technology that enables our Agents to autonomously design, code, debug, and deploy A/B tests, Landing Pages, and Personalization experiences. We effectively 10x testing velocity, replacing agencies, legacy tools, and the need to pull in-house designers and engineers for testing. In the last 6 months, we have already driven more than $200M in revenue for our customers like Dropbox, Replit, and Intuit.

 - Top VCs: We're backed by tier-1 investors including Khosla Ventures, Nat Friedman (former GitHub CEO), and Rich Miner (Android co-founder). Joining now means getting a seat on the rocket ship before our Series A: a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to join in the early innings.

 - OpenAI: We're the only marketing technology company officially partnered with OpenAI. Our engineers and researchers work directly with their team to co-train a model specifically for our use case, which is a differentiator, and a testament to the technical caliber of our team.



What You'll Do:

 - Own the Experimentation Roadmap: Develop and execute comprehensive A/B testing strategies for enterprise customers. You'll identify high-impact opportunities, prioritize tests, and drive a relentless experimentation cadence.

 - Generate Winning Hypotheses: Combine data analysis, UX intuition, and conversion optimization best practices to generate test ideas that move the needle—across landing pages, checkout flows, product pages, and beyond.

 - Leverage AI-Powered Tooling: Use Coframe's proprietary Mark-1 platform to create and deploy test variants at unprecedented speed. You'll be at the forefront of AI-assisted CRO, shipping in hours what traditionally takes weeks.

 - Deliver Measurable ROI: Analyze experiment results, synthesize learnings, and communicate impact to customer stakeholders. You own the narrative around incremental revenue driven and testing velocity achieved.

 - Build the Practice: Help define what world-class AI-powered CRO looks like. Codify frameworks, playbooks, and best practices that scale across our growing customer base.



You May Be A Fit If:

 - 3+ years of hands-on Conversion Rate Optimization, Growth, or Experimentation experience—whether at an agency, in-house growth team, or consulting environment. You've run hundreds of tests and know what wins.

 - Hypothesis Machine: You can look at a page and immediately identify five things to test. You think in terms of friction, motivation, and user psychology.

 - Data-Driven: You're fluent in experimentation metrics—statistical significance, sample sizes, lift calculations—and can confidently interpret results and recommend next steps.

 - Strong Communicator: You can present findings and recommendations to senior stakeholders (VPs, CMOs, CPOs) and build trust as a strategic partner, not just a vendor.

 - The "Builder" Mentality: You thrive in ambiguity and are excited to shape processes and frameworks from the ground up at an early-stage company.



Bonus Points:

 - Agency Experience: You've worked at a CRO or growth agency and understand how to manage multiple client workstreams simultaneously.

 - Technical Fluency: Familiarity with HTML/CSS, landing page builders, or experimentation platforms (Optimizely, VWO, LaunchDarkly) is a plus.

 - Deep Curiosity: You're genuinely excited about AI and eager to push

source_jobs.title: Integrations Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for Integrations Engineers to connect Coframe with the tools our customers already use - CDPs, analytics platforms, CRMs, ad platforms, reporting systems, and task management tools.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

 - Experience with the MarTech ecosystem and common growth tools

 - Strong debugging skills across web apps, APIs, data flows, and identity systems

 - Strong communication with customers and internal stakeholders

 - Ability to prioritize across ambiguous roadmap needs and incoming requests

 - Experience using AI engineering tools to build, maintain, and validate integrations

 - High ownership and comfort working across many systems

 - Good product sense for developer experience and onboarding flows




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Build and maintain integrations with analytics, CRM, CDP, ads, reporting, and workflow tools

 - Design public APIs and systems that expand the Coframe ecosystem

 - Create setup systems that reduce time-to-launch for customers

 - Build debugging tools for events, identity, data sync, and implementation issues

 - Improve reliability, monitoring, and observability across integrations

 - Work directly with customers on complex technical integrations

 - Turn repeated implementation work into scalable product capabilities




BENEFITS:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Life Insurance and Disability Benefits

 - 401k Plan with Coframe match

 - Meals covered in-office

 - Gym membership
   
   


ABOUT US:

 - At Coframe, we are building a future where user and agent interfaces can adapt, evolve, and personalize themselves.

 - We are a primarily in-person company based in San Francisco.

 - We are well-capitalized with backing from Khosla Ventures, Nat Friedman, the founder of Android, and others.

 - We are generating revenue, growing rapidly, and trusted by companies you definitely know.

 - Our team is small and talent-dense, consisting of competitive programmers, former founders (our founder https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshpxyne/ previously co-founded a unicorn), and AI researchers from top institutions who have created a few of the most popular OSS code generation projects.



"You guys are insane." - OpenAI team

"Coframe makes you feel like you have a team of 100 people." - Replit team

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
You’ve mastered product design at a world-class growth org. You’re comfortable being scrappy, want to move fast, and care about the customer. You could go get another design role, or you could be a foundational piece of a rocketship that is building the future of generative UI and design.

The day-to-day work will consist of building and scaling our offering, helping shape the direction of the product, and by extension, the future of generative UI.

You must have experience designing products that are easy to use but have inherent underlying complexity, as well as a level of product thinking and innate curiosity about product users and their needs. Importantly, your skills will not just be used in building our product, but also to help our AI system do design engineering for our customers.




ABOUT US:

 - At Coframe, we're giving every website and app its own AI growth engineer. We envision a future where user interfaces can adapt, evolve, and personalize themselves, giving the internet its own sense of life and intelligence. We are a primarily in-person company based in San Francisco.

 - Our values are core to who we are and how we operate: agency, truth-seeking, growth, and velocity.

 - We are well-capitalized with backing from Khosla Ventures, Nat Friedman, the founder of Android, and others.

 - Our team is small and talent-dense, consisting of competitive programmers, former founders (our founder https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshpxyne/ previously co-founded a unicorn), and AI researchers from top institutions who have created a few of the most popular OSS code generation projects.




QUALIFICATIONS:

 - World-class product design experience (we use Figma)

 - Demonstrated focus on driving business and product outcomes

 - Ability to design intuitive user experiences that may otherwise be complex

 - A strong sense of taste and aesthetics

 - Ability to ship fast and balance quality vs. speed effectively

 - Strong communication is essential, particularly between eng, exec, and product

 - Experience conversion optimization is a plus

 - Early-stage startup/founder experience is a plus




BENEFITS:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Life Insurance and Disability Benefits

 - 401k Plan with Coframe match

 - Meals covered in-office

 - Gym membership

 - Housing stipend based on proximity to our Bay Area office

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Product Engineer / Product Manager

We’re looking for people who have built and shipped products - as a product manager, designer, engineer, or founder. A traditional engineering background is a plus, but not required. You will be owning and driving metrics of one of the product-lines.



You’re a great fit if you have:

 - Skills to navigate user problems and solution space

 - Urge to move fast and deliver value here and now

 - Experience building with AI tools like Claude Code, Cursor, Devin, etc.

 - Good taste for product and design

 - Clear communications with technical and non-technical parts.

 - Context to keep many moving parts and prioritize fast across them.



What you'll do

 - Talk to users every day, watch recordings and check funnels

 - Ship improvements fast to production

 - Build v0 and hand off more complex features

 - Contribute to people and process part of the solution, not just technology.

 - Ensure product is moving according to vision and business goals.

 - Help adopt AI building skills across all teams




BENEFITS:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

source_jobs.title: Applied Scientist
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for Applied Scientists to turn raw data across Coframe-managed surfaces into decisions, measurable lift and insights. This role sits at the intersection of reinforcement learning, experimentation and ranking/personalization.

Your strategies and models will generate lift (though revenue for customers) without any humans in the loop.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

 - built production machine learning systems end to end

 - strong statistics fundamentals and practical judgment with real-world data

 - experience with ranking, optimization, personalization, bandits, or recommendation systems

 - great communication skills to explain complex technical problems and solutions to the rest of the team and to understand the real need and pain of the business we serve.

 - worked in growth or conversion teams before



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - convert product problems into ML problems

 - build systems that optimize conversion, engagement, and revenue using various strategies

 - build simulation and evaluation frameworks for such systems

 - develop experimentation, causal inference, and measurement frameworks

 - build models for personalization, ranking, targeting, and allocation

 - detect opportunities for automated gains across customer programs, analyze performance of existing systems

 - build single optimization system across multiple product lines




BENEFITS:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Life Insurance and Disability Benefits

 - 401k Plan with Coframe match

 - Meals covered in-office

 - Gym membership

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for Forward Deployed Engineers to build custom integrations, workflows, and spearhead new solutions for strategic enterprise customers.

This is a highly technical, high-trust role that sits between engineering, product, and customers. You’ll help solve complex enterprise problems directly while shaping how Coframe expands into larger accounts.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

 - Experience with enterprise martech stacks and customer systems

 - Strong software engineering skills and ability to ship viable solutions

 - Strong communication with executives, operators, and technical teams

 - Experience launching new products or capabilities in enterprise environments

 - High ownership and comfort working with ambiguity

 - Strong product and business sense for identifying the highest-value opportunities

 - Experience building or scaling an enterprise company in this space is a major plus

 - Ability to balance speed, trust, and long-term scalability




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Build custom integrations and solutions for enterprise customers

 - Work directly with customers to understand workflows and technical constraints

 - Travel on-site to customer

 - Partner with internal engineering teams on implementation strategy

 - Resolve complex technical blockers during deployments and growth phases

 - Represent engineering in high-value customer relationships

 - Help shape expansion opportunities inside strategic accounts

source_jobs.title: Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for engineers to build the foundations of our engineering stack - from AI productivity and deployment to monitoring, security, and cost optimization.

This is one of the highest-impact and highest-responsibility roles in the company. Your work will increase the productivity of every team and shape how we build going forward.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

 - Built and scaled complex infrastructure systems

 - Worked with Kubernetes, ETL pipelines, AWS/GCP/Cloudflare, CI/CD, and SOC 2 environments

 - Strong judgment across security, reliability, cost, and iteration-speed tradeoffs

 - Been operating at the edge of AI-first development for some time

 - Learned practical lessons from decades of enterprise-grade engineering patterns

 - Strong opinions on how old systems should be improved or replaced

 - High ownership and comfort working across many domains



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Build internal platforms and AI loops that increase company iteration speed

 - Strengthen security, compliance, and operational readiness

 - Improve CI/CD, testing, deployments, and developer environments

 - Evaluate and implement new tooling, storage, and compute systems

 - Enable non-technical staff to build and ship improvements safely

 - Enable technical teams to ship scalable, enterprise-ready systems faster

 - Resolve incidents and production fires with both immediate fixes and long-term solutions

source_jobs.title: Agent Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for Agent Engineers to build systems that generate, test, monitor interfaces at scale.

This team enables the creation of hundreds of thousands of on-brand, production-ready experiences (Web and beyond) with strong automated QA loops and continuous monitoring systems.

Each improvement here increases optimization space, experimentation velocity, and thus, lift.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

 - Built production AI systems, agent workflows, LLM pipelines

 - Strong software engineering fundamentals and ability to ship reliable non-derministic systems

 - Experience with LLMs, tool use, evaluation systems, and parallel execution.

 - Strong web experience and product sense for what good outputs look like

 - Ability to talk to customer, non-technical partners to convert requirements into: technologies and processes.
   
   


WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Build AI agents that generate interfaces, client-side features, and more at scale.

 - Create validation systems that catch bugs, off-brand outputs, and poor user experiences before launch

 - Create online and offline evaluation systems for generated outputs

 - Build monitoring systems that detect issues and regressions after rollout

 - Improve orchestration between generation, QA, rollout, and learning loops

 - Consistently turn manual workflows into scalable and reliable agents

 - Talk to technical and non-technical teams to capture qualitative feedback and convert it to the metrics and improvements




BENEFITS:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision benefits for you and your family

 - Life Insurance and Disability Benefits

 - 401k Plan with Coframe match

 - Meals covered in-office

 - Gym membership

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Coframe

"You guys are insane." -- OpenAI Team

"Coframe makes you feel like you have a team of 100 people." -- Replit Team



At Coframe, we are building the world's first AI Growth Engineer. We envision a future where user interfaces aren't static code, but living organisms that adapt, evolve, and personalize themselves in real time. We're looking for Solutions Engineers for our CRO product line who have worked on web surfaces for go-to-market, growth, or conversion optimization teams or agencies.



Why Coframe:

 - Elite Team: Our founder previously co-founded a unicorn with Tom Brady and guest lectures AI at Stanford. Our researchers created some of the world's most popular open-source code generation projects.

 - Already Crushing It: Growing at 120% QoQ, our AI Agents autonomously design, code, and deploy A/B tests, Landing Pages, and Personalization experiences, 10x faster than traditional methods. We've driven $200M+ in revenue for customers like Dropbox, Replit, and Intuit in the last 6 months.

 - Top VCs: Backed by Khosla Ventures, Nat Friedman (former GitHub CEO), and Rich Miner (Android co-founder). Join before our Series A.

 - OpenAI: The only martech company officially partnered with OpenAI, co-training a model specifically for our use case.



What You'll Do:

 - Own Technical Onboarding: Lead end-to-end integration of Coframe across customer websites, working directly with client engineering teams.

 - Build and Deploy Test Variants: Design, code, and deploy A/B test variants using our Mark-1 platform. You write the code, not just the brief.

 - Diagnose and Debug: Troubleshoot integration issues, QA test implementations, and ensure experiments run cleanly across browsers, devices, and tech stacks.

 - Own Analytics Integrations: Instrument and validate pipelines across GA4, Segment, Amplitude, and custom data layers.

 - Be the Technical Bridge: Translate between business goals and technical requirements for both client developers and Coframe's internal engineering team.

 - Manage a Portfolio of Accounts: Keep multiple enterprise client workstreams on track simultaneously.



You May Be a Fit If:

 - 3+ years in a technical client-facing role: solutions engineering, technical account management, implementation engineering, or similar.

 - Strong Front-End Chops: Comfortable writing and debugging HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. You can build a test variant from scratch and know why it broke.

 - Analytically Wired: Experienced with GA4, Segment, Amplitude, or Heap and understand how data flows from browser event to dashboard.

 - Sharp Debugger: At home in dev tools, can read a network request, and don't stop until you've found the root cause.

 - Multi-Account Operator: You manage competing priorities across multiple client engagements without losing quality.

 - Bonus: You know what "SSR with tight LCP budget, optimizing PDP for AOV with MAB" means.



Bonus Points:

 - Experience with Optimizely, VWO, LaunchDarkly, or similar experimentation platforms.

 - Familiarity with Google Tag Manager or Tealium.

 - Exposure to Shopify or SaaS product environments.

 - Excited about AI-powered experimentation and autonomous agents.



Compensation

Base: $100,000 - $170,000

Equity: Meaningful early-stage equity.

Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors including experience and expertise.



Benefits:

 - Flexible (Unlimited) Paid Time Off

 - Medical, Dental, and Vision for you and your family

 - 401k with match

 - Daily in-office meals

 - Wellness benefit and gym membership

source_jobs.title: Growth Engineering
source_jobs.description:
You’ve mastered growth engineering at a world-class growth org. You’re comfortable being scrappy, want to move fast, and care about the customer. You could go get another growth engineering role, or you could be a foundational piece of a rocketship that is building the world’s first AI growth engineer.

The day-to-day work will consist of building and scaling our offering, helping shape the direction of the product, and by extension, the future of growth engineering.

You must have experience building high-quality, complex, yet maintainable products, and you should be able to do so in a fraction of the time that most competent people think is possible (in part because of your ability to wield the latest in code generation). Importantly, your skills will not just be used in building our product, but also to help our AI system do growth engineering for our customers.

"You guys are insane."

-OpenAI team




ABOUT US:

 - At Coframe, we're giving every website and app its own AI growth engineer. We envision a future where user interfaces can adapt, evolve, and personalize themselves, giving the internet its own sense of life and intelligence. We are a primarily in-person company based in San Francisco.

 - Our values are core to who we are and how we operate: agency, truth-seeking, growth, and velocity.

 - We are well-capitalized with backing from Khosla Ventures, Nat Friedman, the founder of Android, and others.

 - Our team is small and talent-dense, consisting of competitive programmers, former founders (our founder https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshpxyne/ previously co-founded a unicorn), and AI researchers from top institutions who have created a few of the most popular OSS code generation projects.




QUALIFICATIONS:

 - World-class growth engineering experience

 - Demonstrated focus on driving business outcomes and intuition for great experiments

 - Ability to architect robust, maintainable codebases

 - Ability to ship fast and balance quality vs. speed effectively

Our Tech Stack: React (TypeScript) | Python | Docker | k8s | Kafka | Go | AWS

notes: High-tech startup with AI focus, strong engineering core, and rapid growth
